task.title: Export read-only session report from lab page

requirements.description: Add a read-only session report export to the lab page so current state can be captured as JSON and copied to clipboard.
acceptance: Session report export action exists in the lab page
Export produces a JSON payload with page, preset, and history summary fields
Latest report summary is visible in UI for quick inspection
